message:
feat(eventloop,runtime): expand event loop tick budget and TLS runtime integration

- fr-eventloop/src/lib.rs: add 60 lines expanding tick-budget
  accounting with TLS handshake cost tracking and connection-type
  aware scheduling
- fr-runtime/src/lib.rs: add 60 lines wiring TLS runtime state
  transitions into the main event loop lifecycle, including
  listener enable/disable hooks and context-swap checkpoints

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
